mapper.select:
select u.id as userId, u.username, u.nickname, u.nicknameStatus, u.avatar, u.avatarStatus, u.score, null as completed, null as competitionId, null as competitionTitle from users u
u.role = 'user'
and ( u.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by u.score desc, u.createdAt asc, u.id asc

select u.id as userId, u.username, u.nickname, u.nicknameStatus, u.avatar, u.avatarStatus, cp.score as score, cp.completed, c.id as competitionId, c.title as competitionTitle from competition_participants cp inner join users u on u.id = cp.userId inner join competitions c on c.id = cp.competitionId
cp.competitionId = #{competitionId} and u.role = 'user'
and ( u.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by cp.score desc, cp.completed desc, u.createdAt asc, u.id asc

select c.id, c.title, c.status, c.startDate, c.endDate, c.totalPoints, count(cq.questionId) as questionCount from competitions c left join competition_questions cq on cq.competitionId = c.id group by c.id, c.title, c.status, c.startDate, c.endDate, c.totalPoints order by c.startDate desc, c.id desc
